entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Improved varieties of groundnut studied for adoption in Malawi

entities.name: MALAWI
entities.description: The country where the study on groundnut adoption was conducted

entities.name: AVERAGE TREATMENT EFFECT
entities.description: A framework used to document actual and potential adoption rates and their determinants

entities.name: ADOPTION RATE
entities.description: The proportion of farmers who adopt improved groundnut varieties

entities.name: AWARENESS
entities.description: The state of farmers being informed about the improved groundnut technology

entities.name: PROBIT
entities.description: A classical adoption model used for estimating adoption rates

entities.name: TOBIT
entities.description: A classical adoption model used for estimating adoption rates

entities.name: EXPOSURE
entities.description: The extent to which farmers are exposed to new agricultural technologies

entities.name: SELECTION BIAS
entities.description: Bias in adoption rate estimates resulting from non-random exposure to technology

entities.name: INFORMATION ACCESS
entities.description: Variables that influence the awareness of improved groundnut varieties

entities.name: ECONOMIC CONSTRAINTS
entities.description: Factors such as financial limitations that influence the adoption of technology

entities.name: ACCESS TO CREDIT
entities.description: A specific economic constraint that limits the adoption of improved groundnut varieties
